title: Darklords: Siegefront
description:
Short description 
Choose the Human or Demon faction and command a roster of unique units and faction skills. Build your ideal loadout—up to six core units plus your skill setup—and fight through a full campaign. After clearing every stage, take on Challenge Mode to push your limits and beat your best runs. If the game finds an audience, player-vs-player battles may follow as a future update.

Key features

• Two factions, twelve unique units each — Twelve distinct units per race unlock different armies, matchups, and strategies.

• Distinct unit identities — Every unit brings its own role and mechanics, rewarding timing, positioning, and counterplay.

• Faction-specific skills — Powerful skills tailored to Humans and Demons can swing a fight when used at the right moment.

• Custom loadouts — Select your six unit slots and configure skills to conquer the campaign your way.

• Challenge Mode after campaign completion — Once the campaign is cleared, compete against your own records and refine high-level play.

Future plans 
Player-vs-player modes are under consideration if the game builds a strong community.
description_short: Pick Human or Demon in a real-time strategy game with twelve units and faction skills per race, custom six-unit armies, and a multi-difficulty campaign. Finish the campaign to unlock Challenge Mode and top your records.
